prestazioni: Replace the stock twin-turbocharged 5.0L V8 (engine code: *Koenigsegg TFG V8*) with a bespoke *Weistec Engineering* billet aluminum crankshaft featuring a 94mm stroke (up from 91.25mm) and *Carrillo* H-beam connecting rods to handle 1,500+ hp on E85, paired with *JE Pistons* custom-forged 96mm slugs (13.5:1 compression) and *Ferrea* titanium intake/exhaust valves with *Del West* titanium retainers for 10,000 RPM stability

Upgrade the OEM *Honeywell Garrett GTX5533R* turbos to *Precision Turbo & Engine PT9375CE* ceramic-coated units with 88mm billet compressor wheels, *Tial MV-R* 60mm wastegates, and *TurboSmart* Race Port 50mm blow-off valves, fed by a *PWR* 1,500hp-rated intercooler with dual *SPAL* 16" puller fans and *AEM* 2200cc/min methanol injection for intake cooling

Swap the stock *Koenigsegg* 7-speed transaxle for a *CIMA* 8-speed sequential dog-ring gearbox with *AP Racing* carbon triple-plate clutch (300mm diameter) and *Penske* 3-way adjustable LSD, mated to a *Quaife* ATB differential and *Hewland* billet aluminum bellhousing, all controlled via *Motec M190* paddle-shift system with 20ms upshift blips
estetica: Replace the OEM carbon fiber body with a *Liberty Walk LB-WORKS* widebody kit (Agera RS Evo-specific) featuring 50mm extended front fenders, 70mm rear overfenders, and a *Vorsteiner* carbon fiber front splitter with *Aeromotions* active rear wing (3-position adjustability, 200kg downforce at 250km/h)

Install *HRE* FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x11.5 front, 21x13 rear) with *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R* tires (265/35 ZR20 front, 345/30 ZR21 rear), wrapped in *Brembo* GT-RS 6-piston calipers (42mm front, 38mm rear) clamping *Carbon Revolution* carbon-ceramic rotors (420mm front, 395mm rear) with *Pagid RS29* pads

Full *VMR* carbon fiber interior overhaul: *Sparco* QRT-K seats with *Schroth* 6-point harnesses, *MOMO* carbon fiber steering wheel (380mm diameter) with *Motec* C127 dash display, *Alcantara* headliner, and *Bowers & Wilkins* Diamond Series 12-speaker audio (1,400W) integrated into the *Koenigsegg* door panels
